# Control flow graph

This is a
[mermaid](https://mermaid.ai)
control flow graph for the `GetText` function, in the
[`eat_snacks.owl`](../src/examples/eat_snacks.owl) example file.

Honestly, the input mermaid is so big that GitHub might not even render it,
we'll see if it respects the `maxTextSize` config field.

```mermaid
---
title: Control flow graph
config:
  maxTextSize: 9007199254740991
  themeVariables:
    darkMode: true
    fontFamily: 'Droid Sans Mono, monospace'
    edgeLabelBackground: '#171717'
---

%%
%% This is a control flow graph that was generated by the OWL compiler.
%% https://github.com/owl-whatever-language
%%
%% This particular CFG was generated for the 'GetText' function in the eat_snacks.owl file.
%%
%% Since this file is most likely going to be very difficult to be human-readable,
%% here is a plain text version of the file:
%%
%% fun GetText(int number): text
%% {
%% 	if ((number % 3 == 0) && (number % 5 == 0)) return "eat-snacks";
%% 	if (number % 3 == 0) return "eat";
%% 	if (number % 5 == 0) return "snacks";
%%
%% 	return $"{number}";
%% }
%%

flowchart TB;
```
